llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan selected by the AI assistant includes HealthFirst Standard Plan0 components for physical health, mental health, property, and travel coverage. The '0' suffix appears to be a variant or placeholder, so we match them to the ground-truth 'HealthFirst Standard Plan' entries. According to the ground-truth ratings: HealthFirst Standard Plan for physical health has a rating of 8, and for mental health also 8. For property coverage, the plan name 'HealthFirst Standard Plan0 - Property Component' likely maps to the same brand family, but the ground truth only lists property coverage under names like LifeFirst, InsurePlus, HomeFirst, etc., and there is no HealthFirst property plan. Thus, this element cannot be directly matched to a ground-truth rating. Similarly, the travel coverage under 'HealthFirst Standard Plan0 - Travel Component' does not exist in the ground truth, which includes InsurePlus Standard Plan, LifeFirst Standard Plan, TravelFirst Standard Plan, etc., but no HealthFirst travel plan. Additional services include 'premium_medical_network_addon' and 'adventure_travel_addon', which directly correspond to 'Premium Medical Network' (rating 7) and 'Adventure Travel Coverage' (rating 10) in the travel_enhancement_services section of the ground truth. Therefore, we map the following items: HealthFirst Standard Plan (Physical Health) → 8, HealthFirst Standard Plan (Mental Health) → 8, Premium Medical Network → 7, and Adventure Travel Coverage → 10. Property and travel components of HealthFirst Standard Plan0 have no exact matches in ground truth and are omitted from the ratings mapping.
